conformance: PAM-shaped projection of a Lyhna witnessed-handoff/v1 receipt. Not yet validated against a formal published PAM schema.
name: live-loop
objective: Fix the checkout total rounding bug and confirm the fix with the client

honesty_ceiling.witnessed: action-level only — what crossed the tool boundary vs. what the agent claimed
never_asserts: that a claimed-but-unwitnessed action happened (e.g. an email was sent)
business / legal / quality correctness of the work
honesty_ceiling.rule: every memory item carries evidence_status; an unsupported claim stays unsupported and is never upgraded into a fact
